config.script:
#comment '------------------------------------------------- #comment ' wyslij SMS na numer strTel o tresci strMessage #comment '-------------------------------------------------
function send_sms(byval strTel , byval strMessage) : send_sms = false
dim strOrgTel:strOrgTel = strTel
dim strExtra:strExtra = "" select case operator(strTel,strExtra) case OPERATOR_PLUS send_sms = send_sms_2_PLUS(strTel , strMessage , strExtra) case OPERATOR_ERA send_sms = send_sms_2_ERA(strTel , strMessage) case OPERATOR_IDEA send_sms = send_sms_2_IDEA(strTel , strMessage) case else send_sms = false end select
if send_sms then nx_.trace.info "ISY003", "Wysłano SMS na numer " + strOrgTel else nx_.trace.info "ESY003", "Nie udało się wysłać SMS na numer " + strOrgTel end if end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------
'sprawdzanie i formatowanie numeru private function operator(byref strTel,byref strExtra):operator = -1
dim strPrefix dim strNumer
strTel = replace(strTel," ","") strTel = replace(strTel,"-","") strTel = replace(strTel,"/","") strTel = replace(strTel,"\","") strTel = replace(strTel,"+","")
strNumer = right(strTel,9)
if not isNumeric(strNumer) then trans_.message 1002 , 0 , "Nieprawidłowy format numeru telefonu: " + strTel exit function end if strPrefix = left(strNumer,3) strNumer = right(strNumer,6)
if cint(strPrefix)\100 = 5 then operator = OPERATOR_IDEA else if cint(strPrefix) mod 2 <> 0 then operator = OPERATOR_PLUS strTel = "+48" + cstr(strPrefix) + cstr(strNumer) + "@text.plusgsm.pl" else operator = OPERATOR_ERA end if end if
strExtra = trans_.var(GVAR_APPLICATION) end function
#comment '-------------------------------------------------
private function send_sms_2_PLUS(strTel , strMessage, strExtra):send_sms_2_PLUS = false dim pM60299 : set pM60299 = doc_.getmodule(60299) send_sms_2_PLUS = pM60299.nx_send_mail_internal_0_att(strTel,strExtra,strMessage) end function
private function send_sms_2_ERA(strTel , strMessage) : send_sms_2_ERA = false nx_.trace.error "ISY004", "Wysyłanie SMS do sieci ERA nie jest obsługiwane" end function
private function send_sms_2_IDEA(strTel , strMessage): send_sms_2_IDEA = false nx_.trace.error "ISY004", "Wysyłanie SMS do sieci IDEA/Orange nie jest obsługiwane" end function #comment '------------------------------------------------- function get_http_stream(strURL)
dim WinHttpReq set WinHttpReq = CreateObject("Microsoft.XMLHTTP")
WinHttpReq.Open "GET", strURL, False WinHttpReq.send
Do While WinHttpReq.readyState <> 4 doc_.system.sleep 400 Loop
set get_http_stream = WinHttpReq.responsestream
end function
function get_http_text(strURL)
dim WinHttpReq set WinHttpReq = CreateObject("Microsoft.XMLHTTP")
WinHttpReq.Open "GET", strURL, False WinHttpReq.send
Do While WinHttpReq.readyState <> 4 doc_.system.sleep 400 Loop
get_http_text = WinHttpReq.responseText
end function
function prepare_get_invoice_url(strHost, strNXMApp, idObj) dim strURL
strURL = strHost + "api/data?path=$app/"+ strNXMApp + "/xt&task=nxm.dist.data/create_sales_invoice_pdf&type=stream&document_moniker=erp%7Cnxm.dist%2Fsalesinvoice%7C" +_ cstr(idObj) + "&data_service_xscid=default_erp&inline=false"
prepare_get_invoice_url = strURL end function #comment '-------------------------------------------------
